title: The Highest Quality Dividend Challenger Summary
text: This article presents the highest-quality Dividend Challengers, companies listed on U.S. exchanges with consistently higher annual dividend payouts for 5-9 years. The top 20 highest-quality Dividend Challengers are identified based on a quality scoring system, with Toronto-Dominion Bank, Dolby Laboratories, and Thermo Fisher Scientific making the top three. The article also highlights stocks trading at favorable valuations and offering compelling metrics for income-focused, growth-oriented, value-driven, and total-return investors.

title: 3 Semiconductor Stocks At Risk From China's Economic Slowdown
text: With the AI bounce waning, will China's sluggish economy further put the kibosh on near-term growth for semiconductor stocks like Monolithic Power Systems Inc. NASDAQ: MPRW, Qualcomm Inc. NASDAQ: QCOM and Texas Instruments Inc. NASDAQ: TXN?

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Performance Since Launch
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 2.44% in July, underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.77%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 14.72%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 2.75% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: These 4 stocks also led tech's last 7-month winning streak 9 years ago
text: Artificial intelligence has been widely credited with 2023's seven-month long technology stock rally, which is showing few signs of slowing down as Nvidia Corp. shares have more than tripled over that time, but four other companies rounded out the top 10 performers in a similar rally in 2014.

title: Monolithic Power (MPWR) Q2 Earnings Beat, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Monolithic Power (MPWR) reports a top line contraction year over year in the second quarter of 2023 due to declining trends in several verticals.
